blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,870 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
